title: Baby Bear Bath Time Report
text:
## Bath Time Report

Subject: Baby Bear, baby bear

**Water temperature:** {adjective} but acceptable after {number} tests with one {body part}.

**Soap:** Smelled like {food} and made {color} bubbles around the {object}.

**Incident:** Baby Bear {past-tense verb} when a {adjective} rubber {animal} began {verb ending in -ing}.

**Song request:** A {adjective} lullaby sung {adverb} by {person}.

**After bath:** Baby Bear felt {emotion}, wore a {clothing item}, and tried to {verb} the towel.
